title: Battle of Ord Mantell (disambiguation)
content:
There has been more than one '''Battle of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]''':

==Canon==
*The [[Battle on Ord Mantell]] fought by the [[Shadow Collective]] during the [[Clone Wars]].

==Legends==
'''[[Mandalorian Wars]]
*[[Battle of Ord Mantell (Mandalorian Wars)|Battle of Ord Mantell]]

'''[[Mandalorian civil war (Third Galactic War)|Mandalorian civil war]]
*[[Raid on Kessan's Landing]]

'''[[New Sith Wars]]'''
*[[Battle of Ord Mantell (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Ord Mantell]]

'''[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]'''
*[[Battle of Ord Mantell (Clone Wars)|Battle of Ord Mantell]]
*[[Ambush over Ord Mantell]]

'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''
*[[Battle of Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Battle of Tansarii Point Station]]
*[[Skirmish on Ord Mantell (0.5 ABY)]]
*A [[Skirmish on Ord Mantell (3 ABY)|battle]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]
*A [[Battle of Ord Mantell (8 ABY)|battle]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]
*A [[Battle of Ord Mantell (9 ABY)|battle]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]
*A [[Battle of Ord Mantell (10 ABY)|battle]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].

'''[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]'''
*The [[Battle of Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Ord Mantell]]
*The [[liberation of Ord Mantell]]
